types.notes: 14 & under, with purchase of adult ticket

inclusions: Access to the Gold Hospitality Suite in the Hotel Tower with seating, water, snacks, and a restroom
Wifi in the Gold Pass Lounge
Wine & Cheese Reception on Saturday, April 11, 2026, from 5:00 – 6:30 PM with wine, cheese and crudité
Reserved seating in the evening concerts (first come, first served. Gold Pass Holders must pick up a ticket for the concert).
Morning Refreshments: coffee, tea, water, nuts, granola bars
Afternoon Refreshments: sodas, water, cookies, chips, fruit cups
Personalized Trade Badge** – Show your industry credentials with a name badge for easy networking.
Access to the Industry Mixer** – Connect with top audio professionals at this exclusive networking event on Thursday, April 9 at 6:00 PM.
Trade-Only Networking in the Mobile App** – Use the dedicated messenger feature to schedule meetings and build relationships.
Trade-Only Meeting Areas** – Designated spaces for discussions and deal-making.
_New!_ Industry Seminars: Audio Industry Track** – Gain insights from experts on trends, technology, and strategies shaping the hi-fi market.
